title: Nexus WorldKbGraphResponse
description: Read projection for GET /v1/local/worlds/{world_id}/kb/graph (V1.73). Entities + source-anchor provenance edges. `relationships` is always empty in V1.73 (no kb_relationships table until V1.74); derived reference edges render read-only from source_anchors.

entities.description: All non-deleted KeyBlock entities in the World (confirmed + pending + manual).

relationships.description: Typed World KB relationship projections (V1.74). Symmetric rows emit both stored and symmetric_reverse projections.
